name: No witnesses to my machine injury at work, can I still claim?
description: Yes, use med records and machine evidence.

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my machine injury at work, can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, use med records and machine evidence.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, medical evidence, machine logs, your testimony suffice.[2][7] Circumstantial proof like timing works.[5] Key factors: Photos, video if available; co-worker statements later. Build case methodically.
